# Curator Receipt

## Decision

Kept: this source should enter the institute as a serious research artifact candidate.

## Why

It is an arXiv preprint and the excerpt reports substantial empirical content rather than commentary: four benchmarks, five agent architectures, three LLM families, 180 controlled configurations, and concrete quantitative findings including effect sizes, error amplification rates, cross-validated predictive performance, and task-specific performance deltas. That clearly meets the institute bar for real experimental results.

## Limits
